nasb.text: Moreover, may your house be like the house of Perez whom Tamar bore to Judah, through the offspring which the Lord will give you by this young woman.”

esv.text: and may your house be like the house of Perez, whom Tamar bore to Judah, because of the offspring that the Lord will give you by this young woman.”

cnv.text: 願耶和華從這少婦賜你後裔，使你的家像他瑪從猶大所生法勒斯的家一般。”

ccb.text: 愿耶和华借着这年轻女子赐你后裔，使你家像先祖犹大和她玛的儿子法勒斯家一样。”

csbs.text: 愿耶和华从这年轻女子赐你后裔，使你的家像塔玛尔给犹大所生的法勒斯的家那样！”
